SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF MARK J. ROMEO IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER; FOR TRO; AND OSC RE: CONFIRMATION OF APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND ISSUANCE OF PRELIM INJUNCTION; POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRUST DEED INVESTMENTS, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - ON THE FIRST CALL ON THE MATTER, THE PARTIES INFORMED THE COURT THEY NEED TIME TO CONFER AND MIGHT BE ABLE TO COME TO AN AGREEMENT. ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER, THE PARTIES INFORMED THE COURT THAT NO AGREEMENT WAS REACHED. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. APPLICATION FOR THE APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER AND TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING CONFIRMATION OF APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND ISSUANCE OF PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION - THE TEMPORARY ORDER ISSUED BY THE COURT WILL REMAIN IN EFFECT UP TO THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY OF OCTOBER 28, 2008. IF THE PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT, THE MATTER WILL BE OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF THE PARTIES STIPULATION. IF NO AGREEMENT IS REACHED, THE REQUEST FOR THE APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER IS GRANTED AND WILL TAKE EFFECT AT THAT POINT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
